benefits.description: worked amazing during first 5 weeks at 2mg/week with 10mg vial

side_effects.description: started getting really hungry after 5 weeks with 20mg vial, questioned effectiveness

protocol_notes: User's first protocol: 2mg/week from 10mg vial for 5 weeks, worked well. Second protocol: same dose from 20mg vial, effectiveness deteriorated after week 5 and threw away remaining half. Observed that Reta lasts approximately 5 months after reconstitution rather than 1 month. Recommends 20mg vials for 5-week usage.
